title: Pantheon Base v0.8.8 Release Readiness
goal: Close the Pantheon Base release-readiness gate by fixing data-scope and governance cleanup layout blockers, validating the full system smoke suite, and preparing the next foundation release.

in: shared database self data-scope SQL generation
full backend, frontend, governance, and smoke validation evidence
foundation release PR and release publication gate
out: manual copying from base to ops
unrelated lint baseline remediation outside this release blocker

implementationNotes: Invalid or blank role data-scope values now normalize to all instead of narrowing seeded/admin roles to self.
Self data-scope now inspects the GORM model schema and uses created_by/create_by when present, falls back to id for self-owned tables, and fails closed if the schema has no viable owner column.
Governance cleanup range controls were grouped without the Arco Space wrapper so datetime inputs and the cleanup action remain aligned in the system workbench action bar.
Full local smoke passed after serializing generated-module smoke execution and fixing the cleanup range UI regression.

doNotTouch: local smoke helper scripts containing workstation credentials

requiredEvidence: GitHub PR security and quality gate results
deferredCodeIssues: local Windows race-mode requires MinGW cgo toolchain
independent non-author review was unavailable in this session

designGate: impeccable UI gate applied to governance cleanup range controls
rendered evidence supplied by Playwright smoke covering the cleanup range UI
developmentGate: changes stay scoped to IAM data-scope behavior, shared database scope helper, and governance action bar layout
githubGovernanceGate: PR branch required by protected main
Security Gates and Code Quality Gates must pass before merge

affectedSubgraph: role service -> normalizeRoleDataScope -> role data-scope persistence
database WithDataScope -> self mode -> GORM statement schema -> SQL predicate
GovernanceCleanupBar -> table batch action bar CSS -> system governance pages
boundaryCrossings: system governance UI -> shared system list-page CSS
riskNodes: data-scope default widening for invalid role data
self-scope fail-closed behavior when model schema is unavailable
governance cleanup range action layout on constrained widths

runtimeEvidence: local backend, frontend, and smoke command outcomes in commands.json

viewports: Playwright smoke desktop viewport for system governance cleanup range UI
states: cleanup range controls visible and actionable

humanGates: GitHub branch protection requires PR merge
independent non-author review is recorded as unavailable rather than claimed
